---
title: Cert Manager
subtitle: ""
description: ""
author: Shane Oh
date: 2025-02-04
image: "https://cert-manager.io/images/cert-manager-logo-icon.svg"
categories:
  - Kubernetes
  - Ingress
---

How does cert-manager work? Previously,
the [post](./TLS.qmd) on TLS explained the cryptographic principles and handshake mechanisms that underpin TLS.

## Certificate Authorities (CAs)

Then how do CA certificates work?
